questions.question: Why has wildlife returned to the Chernobyl Exclusion Zone?
options: Because human activity has largely disappeared
questions.explanation: The passage says that the long-term absence of human activity allowed many species to return.

questions.question: What does the exclusion zone restrict?
options: Permanent habitation, commercial activity and access
questions.explanation: The text lists permanent human habitation, commercial activity, public access and resource extraction.
